-March 26, 1999
Welcome to DBZ Ulimited, hope you like the new April layout. Since my last layout looked so tacky I thought I'd make a few improvements. For now all that's changed is the main page, but I plan to have the new image gallery done by April 25! Enjoy what's here now and just wait a while for things to come.


:) (About) (Learn) (Misc) (Web Ring) (Sign) (View) (Contact) (:

[News: As of the beginning of March DBZ unlimited has been under new managment. Thanks to Kemonsa I am the new maintainer of DBZ Unlimited. This page is now a part of the Area 55 collective.
